news.headline: SM Energy to acquire Uinta Basin assets for $2.55B, Northern Oil & Gas to buy 20% stake for $510M, leaving SM with 80%.
news.summary: SM Energy Company (NYSE:SM) is seeing a significant decline in its shares today following the announcement of its acquisition of Uinta Basin oil and gas assets from XCL Resources, LLC. for a total purchase price of $2.55 billion. Concurrently, Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE:NOG) revealed its purchase of a 20% interest in XCL's assets for $510 million, leaving SM Energy with an 80% ownership for a net cost of $2.04 billion. SM Energy will be taking over operational control from XCL and intends to finance the transaction using a combination of debt and available cash reserves.

news.headline: Pulmonary Fibrosis Foundation's 2024 PFF Walk aims to raise funds for a cure with nationwide walks starting July 20 in Pittsburgh.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Chicago, the Pulmonary Fibrosis Foundation (PFF) revealed the commencement of their 2024 PFF Walk series starting on July 20 in Pittsburgh. This initiative aims to gather support and increase awareness for pulmonary fibrosis (PF) and interstitial lung disease (ILD) across the nation. The series will involve walks in various cities to raise funds.

news.headline: Global absorbent paper market valued at $143.1 billion in 2024, expected to reach $265.0 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 6.35%.
news.summary: A recent report available on ResearchAndMarkets.com highlights the Global Absorbent Paper Market, with a value of $143.1 billion in 2024. It is projected to see a growth rate of 6.35% to reach $265.0 billion by 2034. The expansion in the absorbent paper sector is largely due to the rising awareness concerning personal and environmental hygiene.

news.headline: Report by ResearchAndMarkets.com highlights emerging growth opportunities and business models driven by nearshoring trend. Organizations shifting focus towards resilient and risk-proof supply chain due to war tensions. Global supply chains facing challenges, pandemic disruption nearly ended.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Emerging Growth Opportunities and Business Models Driven by the Nearshoring Trend" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The impact of war tensions has significantly challenged global supply chains, prompting organizations to prioritize the development of resilient and secure supply chains due to ongoing geopolitical crises. While the disruptions caused by the pandemic have nearly concluded, they have emphasized the importance of adapting to evolving supply chain risks.

news.headline: Wall Street has modest gains, awaiting Fed's inflation report. U.S. banks pass 2024 stress tests. Chipmakers struggle, while gold and Bitcoin rebound. Regional banks fare better.Indices show marginal gains. Semiconductor sector faces challenges, Nvidia declines by almost 2%. Treasury yields drop ahead of inflation report.
news.summary: Wall Street had a quiet trading day ahead of the release of the Federal Reserve's inflation gauge, with traders staying cautious. U.S. banks passed the 2024 stress tests, proving their ability to maintain capital requirements in a severe economic shock. Regional banks outperformed larger ones. Major indices showed marginal gains at midday, with small caps doing better. The semiconductor sector and Nvidia Corp. saw declines. Treasury yields fell as demand for bonds increased before the inflation report, with the 10-year Treasury bond yield dropping by 4 basis points.

news.headline: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. declares June distribution for the Faircourt Fund (NEO:FGX) in Toronto.
news.summary: Faircourt Asset Management Inc., as the manager of the Faircourt Fund (NEO: FGX), has disclosed the monthly distribution payment for the fund's shares. The announcement was made in Toronto on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Real Vision analyst Coutts is optimistic about altcoins as top 200 equal weight vs market cap weight ratio hits -2.8 SDs.
news.summary: Real Vision analyst Jamie Coutts recently shared an optimistic perspective on high-quality altcoins, highlighting a favorable setup as global liquidity prepares for expansion. Coutts pointed out that the top 200 equal weight versus market cap weight ratio has reached extreme bearish levels at -2.8 standard deviations. This level has only been reached three times before, each marking significant points in the cryptocurrency market cycle. Coutts observed that in 2021, during a bull market, this ratio indicated a good time to re-enter the cycle. In 2022, it signaled near the cycle lows, when the market was down 70%. In 2023, it was close to the capitulation lows catalyzed by the SEC, with altcoins breaking higher four months later. Despite the limited sample size, Coutts remains positive about the potential of high-quality altcoins.

news.headline: The Milestone Group acquires 488-unit Axis Delray Beach Apartments in FL. Purchase price not disclosed.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, The Milestone Group (Milestone) revealed the completion of their acquisition of Axis Delray Beach Apartments. This property consists of 488 units and is a garden-style multifamily community situated at 1495 Spring Harbor Drive in Delray Beach, FL. The specific amount of the purchase remains undisclosed.

news.headline: TBWA introduces 4 Disruption® Roadmaps to rescue creativity from algorithms at Cannes seminar.
news.summary: At the recent TBWA Disruption® Seminar in Cannes, France on June 27, 2024, it was emphasized that in the era dominated by algorithms, creativity remains a crucial form of optimistic rebellion and a beneficial force for society. The seminar highlighted the pressing issue of creativity becoming increasingly homogenized, posing a challenge for makers, creators, and thinkers. This gathering underlined the significance of preserving and nurturing creativity amidst technological advancements.

news.headline: Explore Wisconsin's 'Top Chef' filming locations and cuisine with Travel Wisconsin, post season conclusion in June 2024.
news.summary: Travel Wisconsin is showcasing filming spots and culinary hotspots across the state. Following the end of Bravo's "Top Chef" Wisconsin season, the organization is assisting people in exploring more of the local cuisine. This initiative aims to promote tourism and appreciation for Wisconsin's diverse culinary scene. Residents and visitors can leverage these resources to discover more about the state’s food culture.

news.headline: The Institutes RiskStream Collaborative® in Malvern, PA expands into AI technology solutions.
news.summary: A technology company based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, The Institutes RiskStream Collaborative®, has revealed its latest initiative of incorporating artificial intelligence into its solutions. The expansion of solution interests by the collaborative aims to leverage the capabilities of AI technology in their operations.

news.headline: Primanti Bros. from ARB opens its 43rd location in Baltimore, Linthicum Heights, Maryland; part of measured growth strategy.
news.summary: Authentic Restaurant Brands (ARB), a diversified platform of iconic regional restaurant brands, revealed plans to expand Primanti Bros. into Baltimore. Linthicum Heights, Maryland was chosen as the spot for the first Baltimore eatery of the 91-year-old brand, making it the 43rd location overall. The move to introduce Primanti Bros. in Baltimore aligns with ARB’s strategic approach for measured growth based on their concentric circle model.

news.headline: Renais Gin, co-founded by Alex and Emma Watson in 2023, has launched in the US, inspired by French wine-making.
news.summary: Renais, a high-end contemporary gin established by siblings Alex and Emma Watson in 2023, has disclosed its launch in the United States. Drawing significant influence from the elegance of French winemaking customs, Renais is a product of collaborative work by distillers, craftsmen, and connoisseurs from the UK and France. The gin is sustainably distilled from repurposed grapes from French wine presses and intricately blended with entirely natural botanicals.

news.headline: OneAmerica Financial introduces new non-qualified deferred compensation plans to its Retirement Services portfolio.
news.summary: OneAmerica Financial℠ unveiled its latest addition to the Retirement Services (RS) portfolio in Indianapolis on June 27, 2024. The organization introduced new non-qualified deferred compensation (NQDC) plan solutions to enhance its retirement offerings. This move aims to expand the range of options available and provide more comprehensive retirement planning for customers. The new solutions are designed to cater to the growing demand for flexible and personalized retirement plans. This development showcases OneAmerica Financial℠'s commitment to meeting the evolving needs of its clients in the realm of retirement planning.

news.headline: Cubhub attains SOC 2 Type 2 compliance certification, ensuring data protection and user satisfaction.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Dallas, leading pediatric homecare software provider Cubhub revealed its achievement of SOC 2 Type 2 compliance. This milestone showcases their commitment to protecting customer data and improving user experience.

news.headline: Magnolia Medical introduces Magnolia Analytics™ service to track sepsis misdiagnosis prevention, exclusively for customers.
news.summary: On June 27th in Seattle, a distinctive and exclusive service was introduced for Magnolia Medical clients as a component of the Mission to ZERO® standards alteration initiative. This service incorporates evidence-based best practices and leverages the clinically validated Steripath® product line. The initiative aims to enhance patient care and outcomes by reducing healthcare-associated infections.

news.headline: In-flight Entertainment & Connectivity market to reach $11.7 billion by 2029, growing at 6.3% from 2024.

These statistics come from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™. The growth in this industry is attributed to the growing number of passengers...

news.headline: Money20/20 USA reveals 2024 speaker lineup for 'Human X Machine' theme with 50 initial speakers for Las Vegas event, expecting 350+ speakers from top financial institutions and fintech companies.

More than 350 speakers, including executives from major financial institutions like JPMorgan Chase and Mastercard, top US banks such as Wells Fargo and PNC Bank, and global fintech leaders like Block, Nubank, Plaid, and Wise, are anticipated to participate in the event.

The updated list now comprises X number of entities, reflecting any additions or removals based on regulatory requirements and assessments. These updates are crucial for ensuring effective oversight and supervision of OTC derivatives trading activities in the region.

news.summary: A venture capital firm named Zoi Capital, focusing on AI solutions for healthcare, is poised to increase its investments in innovative healthcare companies. Founded by Dr. [Name], an experienced cardiologist trained at Mayo Clinic, the firm is based in New York. This expansion in investments comes as part of the firm's strategy to support cutting-edge ventures in healthcare. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024. Zoi Capital seeks to boost its funding to help drive forward advancements in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: India Data Center Market valued at $6.9B in 2023, expected to reach $13.96B by 2029 with a growth rate of 12.46% - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: The "India Data Center Market - Investment Analysis & Growth Opportunities 2024-2029" report is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The India Data Center Market was assessed at USD 6.90 Billion in 2023 and is projected to hit USD 13.96 Billion by 2029, indicating a CAGR of 12.46%. This report provides insights into the market share of India's data center, analyzing current and future facilities, as well as investments in IT, electrical, and mechanical infrastructures.

news.headline: Trader believes Pepe may reach all-time highs with "pretty good odds" as BTC performance improves. PEPE down 26% from ATH.
news.summary: Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) has experienced a 26% decrease from its peak value. Despite this decline, a trader is optimistic about the meme coin's prospects if Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) performs well. Trader Davie Satoshi outlined four potential outcomes: BTC and PEPE both drop, PEPE rises due to an "altseason," both BTC and PEPE increase, or BTC climbs while PEPE falls. Satoshi deems the last scenario improbable and illogical, emphasizing three more plausible scenarios, two of which are advantageous for PEPE. Additionally, Satoshi noted wave patterns on the Pepe chart, predicting an imminent wave 3 of 3 candles and hinting at a minor wave 2 retracement.

news.headline: Whirlpool's stock drops as hype over Bosch bid fades. Analyst rates it as Buy, sets $118 price target. Whirlpool leads appliance market with 25% NA share.
news.summary: Today, Whirlpool Corporation (NYSE:WHR) saw a decrease in shares following a surge yesterday sparked by reports of Robert Bosch GmbH potentially bidding for the company. Analyst Susan Maklari from Goldman Sachs has given the stock a Buy rating with a price target of $118. Maklari highlighted the disparity in market shares between Robert Bosch, holding 6% globally and only 1.5% in North America, and Whirlpool, which commands a 25% market share in North America and 10% globally as of 2023. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Altius Renewable Royalties secures $30MM financing for US solar projects with Nokomis Energy, LLC.
news.summary: In St. John’s, Newfoundland, Altius Renewable Royalties Corporation (ARR) shared that its subsidiary, Great Bay Renewables LLC, has collaborated with U.S.-based renewable energy developer Nokomis Energy, LLC to secure forthcoming royalties concerning Nokomis’s solar development projects. Great Bay, jointly owned by ARR and Apollo, has entered into this transaction to benefit from the future revenue streams generated by Nokomis’s portfolio of solar projects. ARR's stock symbols are TSX:ARR and OTCQX: ATRWF.

news.headline: Binance closes prime brokerage loophole due to arbitrage exploiting multi-tiered fees by some Link clients. #Baninance #arbitrage
news.summary: Following reports of Binance Link clients exploiting the program's multi-tiered fee system through arbitrage, changes have been implemented. This decision was made due to the misuse by some clients to gain an unfair advantage.

news.headline: UES acquires CSI, a Lexington-based firm, expanding its Midwest presence. Fastest-growing engineering/acquisition firm.
news.summary: The top engineering and consulting company in the nation, UES, has recently acquired the Lexington, KY-based firm, CSI. This strategic acquisition took place on June 27, 2024, in Orlando, Florida. UES is known for being the fastest-growing company in the industry and their latest acquisition adds to their portfolio a diversified consulting firm with a specialization in various areas. This move positions UES as a dominant player in the market, solidifying their reputation as a leader in the engineering and consulting sector.

news.headline: Solana's 9% gain, fueled in part by VanEck's ETF application, prompts traders to predict potential increase and favoritism over Ethereum due to defensiveness.
news.summary: VanEck's application for a Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) ETF has led to a 9% surge in the market, igniting discussions among traders about the potential for further gains. Ng Ah Sio, a prominent crypto trader, revealed that he has been increasing his Solana holdings after the cryptocurrency hit a support zone. While many are currently favoring Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) in anticipation of ETF launches, Sio believes that funds will shift towards higher performing assets once the initial excitement fades. He highlighted Solana's strong performance on lower time frames and expressed confidence in its ability to lead the market in a risk-on environment. Sio shared his strategy of investing in SOL against ETH, expecting this trade to play out positively in the coming week. Another trader also anticipates... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Young adults face financial challenges, motivating them to save more. - Reported by Bloomberg.
Novo Nordisk acquired 2seventy's Hemophilia A program; team will join with the technology. Abecma focused with FDA approval.
news.summary: 2seventy Bio Inc. (NASDAQ:TSVT) recently finalized an asset purchase agreement with Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE:NVO) on Thursday.As per the terms, Novo Nordisk has acquired the Hemophilia A program and the rights to 2seventy’s in vivo gene editing technology, excluding its application in oncology and gene editing for autologous or allogeneic cell therapies of immune cells for autoimmune disease.The existing team from 2seventy bio engaged in the program will transition to Novo Nordisk, where they will remain dedicated to progressing the technology.For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Infosys BPM opens second office at Montana Industrial Park in Aguadilla, Puerto Rico: New jobs incoming.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Infosys BPM, the business process management division of Infosys, unveiled its new facility at the Montana Industrial Park in Aguadilla, Puerto Rico. The second facility aims to bolster the company's operations and services, marking a significant milestone in their expansion efforts. This development showcases Infosys' commitment to growth and innovation, further solidifying its presence in the region. The expansion is expected to create numerous job opportunities and contribute to the economic development of Aguadilla. Infosys, listed on the NSE as INFY, BSE as INFY, and NYSE as INFY, continues to strengthen its global footprint through strategic investments and expansions like this one.

news.headline: Tech stocks, led by chipmakers like Nvidia, push markets higher. Nasdaq rises 1%; S&P 500 up 0.1%, Dow Jones dips 0.9%. Fed hints at further rate hikes.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the tech sector is expected to rebound after a three-day decline, largely due to a strong performance in chipmakers. Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) saw a 4% increase, pushing its valuation back over $3 trillion. The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:SMH) rose by 1.8% following a 7% drop over the past three sessions, indicating renewed interest in AI-related stocks.The Nasdaq 100 surged by nearly 1%, outperforming other major indices. Conversely, non-tech sectors experienced subdued sentiment, with the S&P 500 inching up by 0.1%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average and Russell 2000 fell by 0.9% and 0.6% respectively.Treasury yields slightly rose after the Fed’s Michelle Bowman made hawkish remarks, leaving the door open for further rate hikes if inflation progress stalls. The iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (NASDAQ:TLT) saw a 0.2% dip, while a U.S. dollar trade-weighted measure gained 0.2%.Overall, commodities mostly saw declines.

news.headline: FDA approves AbbVie/Genmab's Epkinly for r/r follicular lymphoma, benefiting 15,000 U.S. patients annually. Commercialization shared between companies.
news.summary: The FDA has recently given the green light to Epkinly (epcoritamab-bysp) as the initial T-cell-engaging bispecific antibody that can be administered subcutaneously to adults grappling with relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma (r/r F), after undergoing two or more rounds of previous treatment. This innovative treatment is a collaborative effort between AbbVie Inc. (NYSE: ABBV) and Genmab A/S (NASDAQ: GMAB) within the realm of oncology. Responsibilities for commercialization will be divided, with AbbVie managing operations in the U.S. and Japan while also overseeing global commercialization activities.The approval, granted under the FDA’s Accelerated Approval program, is based on factors such as overall response rate (ORR) and the sustainability of the response. Future endorsement for this specific indication might be dependent on the confirmation and articulation of clinical advantages through subsequent trials.It is estimated that roughly 15,000 individuals are diagnosed with follicular lymphoma (FL) annually in the United States, a condition that is believed to be incurable using current standard-of-care treatments. The FDA's decision stems from Phase ...Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Federal Reserve CIO states it's challenging to rationalize hiring human coders over AI; views AI as a 'super analyst'.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve's leadership appears to see generative AI as a highly capable "super analyst" that could significantly enhance the agency's operational efficiency.

news.headline: RWS Global partners with CAMP to bring immersive shows to families worldwide, featuring popular IPs like Bluey and Trolls.
news.summary: RWS Global, the top live entertainment leader, has revealed a new partnership with CAMP to create immersive experiences for popular entertainment properties. This collaboration will include IP-driven attractions for well-known brands such as BBC's Bluey, Disney's Encanto and The Little Mermaid, as well as Universal's Trolls and more. The announcement was made in New York on June 27, 2024. This long-term partnership is set to bring these experiences to life in multiple locations, offering unique and engaging entertainment for audiences worldwide.

news.headline: IDC forecasts double-digit growth in security products revenue to continue through 2028 after reaching $106.8 billion in 2023, a 15.6% increase from 2022.
news.summary: In 2023, global revenue for security products reached $106.8 billion, marking a 15.6% rise from the previous year as reported by IDC.

news.headline: ZEX token skyrockets as Zeta Markets' airdrop exceeds expectations, doubling in value on Thursday.
news.summary: On Thursday, the value of Zeta Markets' token saw a significant increase, doubling in value. This unexpected surge surpassed pre-market predictions for the Solana perpetuals DEX airdrop.

news.headline: 75 participants borrow $531.692 billion from Federal Reserve through Reverse Repo Operation.
Bridge Bank provides $47M term loan to support Divergent Technologies' growth in Torrance, CA.
news.summary: Today, Bridge Bank's Technology Banking Group finalized a $47 million term loan with Divergent Technologies Inc., based in Torrance, California. The loan aims to facilitate Divergent's expansion efforts. Divergent specializes in utilizing data-driven methods to develop and construct vehicle frameworks through their innovative Divergent Adaptive Production System (DAPS™). DAPS™ is recognized as the inaugural complete software-hardware production system globally, catering to industrial digital manufacturing needs within the automotive, aerospace, and defense sectors.

news.headline: Ampersand Capital Partners named top PE fund manager in Americas by Preqin for second year, a feat announced on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In the latest report released on June 27, 2024, Ampersand Capital Partners ("Ampersand") from Wellesley, Massachusetts, has secured the top position for the second year in a row as the leading Private Equity Fund Manager in the Americas for private capital performance. The rankings were provided by Preqin, a reputable organization in the industry. This recognition highlights Ampersand's successful track record in managing private equity funds in the region. The announcement was made as part of the annual awards, showcasing top performers in the sector.

news.headline: Washington Poison Center hires James Leonard, PharmD, DABAT as new Managing Director.Characters: 87
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, the Washington Poison Center (WAPC), a nonprofit organization in Washington offering free medical guidance on medication errors, poisonings, and drug overdoses, welcomed James Leonard, PharmD, DABAT as its new Managing Director. Dr. Leonard brings expertise in the field to lead the center in its mission.

news.headline: Automotive industry set to reach 104 million units by 2030, with a CAGR of 2.4% from 88 million units in 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago on June 27, 2024, PRNewswire reported that the Automotive Industry, including PV, LCV, and MHCV segments, is anticipated to increase from 88 million units in 2024, reaching an estimated 104 million units by 2030. This growth is projected to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 2.4%. These findings are based on a recent report by MarketsandMarkets.

news.headline: Idaho emergency abortions permitted by Supreme Court temporarily.#SCOTUS #Idaho #abortion
Zevo partners with MLS and Landon Donovan to offer up to 8 hours of bug protection, their official bug spray.
news.summary: CINCINNATI - Zevo On-Body is thrilled to announce its partnership with Major League Soccer (MLS), marking the League’s inaugural bug spray collaboration. Offering up to eight hours of scent-free, non-greasy defense against mosquitoes and ticks, Zevo stands out as the top choice. Partnering with renowned soccer figure Landon Donovan, the brand emphasizes the importance of MVP-worthy protection. Donovan, a US soccer icon and MLS star, brings firsthand experience to the partnership, underscoring their shared mission.

news.headline: MCWT's Reignite! program in Michigan helps women return to workforce & transition into tech careers. Applications open for 2024.
news.summary: Southfield, Michigan - On June 26, 2024, the Michigan Council of Women in Technology (MCWT) Foundation launched applications for the 2024 Reignite! program. The program targets women re-entering the workforce and shifting towards tech careers. This effort aims to provide necessary support and guidance for women looking to transition into the tech industry.

news.headline: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Texas and Baylor Scott & White Health extend contracts to Oct. 1, 2024, three-month extension.

This three-month extension will allow Baylor Scott & White providers to continue offering services through this collaboration.

news.headline: Talen Energy responds to Exelon/AEP objection to Susquehanna ISA due to changing demand for power.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Talen Energy Corporation (OTCQX: TLNE) based in Houston released a statement highlighting the significant impact of artificial intelligence and data centers on the power sector. The company noted that these advancements have led to a shift in power demand, marking a crucial turning point for the industry. The statement emphasizes the transformative nature of AI and data centers, underscoring the need for the sector to adapt to these changes.

news.headline: June 2024 Quarterly Bulletin by HKMA highlights latest in banking sector for Hong Kong. More details coming soon.
news.summary: The Quarterly Bulletin for June 2024 has been released by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), highlighting the latest updates in the banking sector. This report provides insights into the significant happenings within the industry during the stated period.

Century Communities is now selling townhomes and single-family homes in Hickory, NC at Trivium, with some of the largest homebuilders in the nation, including online sales leader Century Complete.

Known for being one of the largest homebuilders nationwide and excelling in online home sales, the company stands out as the top-ranked homebuilder. news.headline: Elite Rewards raises funds in 11th annual Furniture Mart USA Charity Golf Classic for Emily's Hope, The Promising Futures Fund, and The Rising Star Foundation.
